query:
SELECT bi.id, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.customerExternalId, bi.invoiceDate, bi.accountCode
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE (bi.billingPlatform = '' OR bi.billingPlatform IS NULL)
  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  AND bi.lineAmount > 0
